name: TeaCombine.Effectful.Pair

values.name: initWith
values.type: ( model2, Cmd msg2 ) -> ( model1, Cmd msg1 ) -> ( Both model1 model2, Cmd (Either msg1 msg2) )

values.name: subscribeWith
values.type: Subscription model2 msg2 -> Subscription model1 msg1 -> Subscription (Both model1 model2) (Either msg1 msg2)

values.name: updateWith
values.comment: Updates one of two submodels using corresponding subupdate function.
values.type: Update model2 msg2 -> Update model1 msg1 -> Update (Both model1 model2) (Either msg1 msg2)

binops.type: Update model1 msg1 -> Update model2 msg2 -> Update (Both model1 model2) (Either msg1 msg2)
Subscription model1 msg1 -> Subscription model2 msg2 -> Subscription (Both model1 model2) (Either msg1 msg2)
( model1, Cmd msg1 ) -> ( model2, Cmd msg2 ) -> ( Both model1 model2, Cmd (Either msg1 msg2) )

name: TeaCombine.Effectful.Many
comment:
Combinators those help to work with homogenous sets of sub-models
(in a form of @Array).

TODO: add some great docs.

@docs updateEach, updateAll

values.name: updateAll
values.comment: Updates an @Array of sub-models using a @List of sub-updates.
values.type: List (Update model msg) -> Update (Array model) (Ix msg)

values.name: updateEach
values.comment:
Updates each sub-model in @Array using a function
from sub-model index to sub-update.
values.type: (Int -> Update model msg) -> Update (Array model) (Ix msg)

name: TeaCombine.Pure.Many
comment:
Combinators those help to work with homogenous sets of sub-models
(in a form of @Array).

TODO: add some great docs

@docs updateEach, updateAll

values.name: updateAll
values.comment: Updates an @Array of sub-models using a @List of sub-updates.
values.type: List (Update model msg) -> Update (Array model) (Ix msg)

values.name: updateEach
values.comment:
Updates each sub-model in @Array using a function
from sub-model index to sub-update.

name: TeaCombine.Pure.Pair

values.name: updateWith
values.comment: Updates one of two sub-models using corresponding sub-update function.
values.type: Update model2 msg2 -> Update model1 msg1 -> Update (Both model1 model2) (Either msg1 msg2)

binops.type: Update model1 msg1 -> Update model2 msg2 -> Update (Both model1 model2) (Either msg1 msg2)

name: TeaCombine.Effectful

aliases.name: Subscription
aliases.comment: A type alias for the subscription function.

aliases.name: Update
aliases.comment: A type alias for the effectful update function.

name: TeaCombine.Pure

aliases.name: Update
aliases.comment: A type alias for the pure update function.

name: TeaCombine

unions.name: Ix
unions.comment: Wrapper type that adds an index.

aliases.name: Both
aliases.comment: An alias for the pair of things (product of two types).

aliases.name: View
aliases.comment: An alias for the view function.

values.name: bind
values.comment:
Makes a function that applies a getter to the model and
then modifies result.
This is a first step in a "bind+[thenBind]"-chain.

values.name: initAll
values.comment: Just an alias for @Array.fromList (made for convinience).

values.name: joinViews
values.comment:
Works as @viewBoth but returns a function that produces a list of sub-views.
This is a first step of "joinViews+[withView]" chain.
values.type: View model1 msg1 -> View model2 msg2 -> Both model1 model2 -> List (Html (Either msg1 msg2))

values.name: thenBind
values.comment: Adds an another step to the "bind+[thenBind]"-chain.
values.type: (model2 -> a) -> (model1 -> a -> b) -> Both model1 model2 -> b

values.name: viewAll
values.comment:
Returns a list of @Html produced by applying a @List of sub-views
to the @List of sub-models (like @List.zip does).
values.type: List (View model msg) -> Array model -> List (Html (Ix msg))

values.name: viewBoth
values.comment: Combines two sub-views into a pair (@Both).
values.type: View model1 msg1 -> View model2 msg2 -> Both model1 model2 -> Both (Html (Either msg1 msg2)) (Html (Either msg1 msg2))

values.name: viewEach
values.comment:
Returns a list of @Html produced by applying an index-aware view
to the each of sub-models.
values.type: (Int -> View model msg) -> Array model -> List (Html (Ix msg))

values.name: viewSome
values.comment: Works as @viewEach but returns only some of sub-views.
values.type: (Int -> Maybe (View model msg)) -> Array model -> List (Html (Ix msg))

values.name: withView
values.comment: Continues a "joinViews+[withView]" chain by adding an another sub-view.
values.type: View model2 msg2 -> (model1 -> List (Html msg1)) -> Both model1 model2 -> List (Html (Either msg1 msg2))

binops.type: (model1 -> List (Html msg1)) -> View model2 msg2 -> Both model1 model2 -> List (Html (Either msg1 msg2))
View model1 msg1 -> View model2 msg2 -> Both model1 model2 -> List (Html (Either msg1 msg2))
View model1 msg1 -> View model2 msg2 -> Both model1 model2 -> Both (Html (Either msg1 msg2)) (Html (Either msg1 msg2))
